title: andropogon nutans var. contractus
intro: Andropogon nutans var. contractus, also known as the 'Red Grass' or 'Bush Grass', is a variety of the Andropogon nutans plant, which belongs to the Poaceae family of grasses. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Andropogon nutans var. contractus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat various skin conditions. It can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional African and Asian medicine to treat various ailments.
